title: TusCBEC Invites Global Innovators to Join China-ASEAN AI Innovation Collaboration Initiative
description: JAKARTA, Indonesia, March 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- TusCBEC, a member of the TusStar innovation ecosystem and event partner for the AI collaboration initiative, is promoting and inviting universities, research institutions, enterprises, and startup teams to participate in the China-ASEAN Artificial Intelligence (AI) Innovation Collaboration Program.

title: Singapore Must Train More People to Build AI, Official Says
description: Singapore has committed more than S$1 billion ($782 million) to become a global hub for artificial intelligence. But one of the architects of that effort says the country’s approach to AI readiness may not be sufficient.
content:

title: AI won’t cut drug development from 15 years to 3: Bayer CEO Anderson warns of over exuberance
description: Artificial intelligence may be transforming pharmaceutical research, but it will not compress drug development timelines as dramatically as many expect, according to Bill Anderson, chief executive of Bayer.
content:
Speaking exclusively to CNBC-TV18 during this week-long India visit from the company’s Bengaluru headquarters, Anderson cautioned against exaggerated expectations around the technology’s impact on the pharmaceutical industry.

description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp has said that artificial intelligence (AI) could shift economic influence away from Democratic voters.
content:

title: Meta delays rollout of new AI model code-named 'Avocado,' NYT reports
